name: Chocolate Ice Cream#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk, allowing it to heat until small bubbles form on the surface.
2. Dissolve the sugar in 2 cups of the scalded milk.
3. Slowly pour the sugar and milk mixture over melted chocolate, stirring constantly to avoid dark specks.
4. Add the remaining three cups of milk.
5. Stir in vanilla and salt.
6. Churn the mixture in an ice cream freezer until desired consistency is reached.
7. Makes about 2 quarts.
Possum Kingdom Lake Cookbook
